author: claude

patch.value: Goal: validate pm-changelog is fully release-ready with strict TypeScript, official SDK, CI/CD, complete pm governance, and a clean public release. Scope covers TS audit, CI cleanup of inline JS, full-history changelog regen, temp install verification, and a npm + GitHub release.
Production readiness audit and release for pm-changelog 2026-05-25

Full readiness gate for pm-changelog covering source code TypeScript strictness, official pm SDK usage only, CI/CD changelog automation, package management hygiene, and a public npm + GitHub release with a clean full-history CHANGELOG.md.

Source is fully strict TypeScript using @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk only; CHANGELOG.md is full-history with no duplicates and GitHub-compatible links; pm package installs in temp folder; release shipped to npm and GitHub with no secrets leaked.
Maintains trustworthy public pm-changelog package for downstream pm-cli CHANGELOG.md automation.
Removes regression risk from inline JavaScript in release automation and guarantees changelog history is complete.
Cut pm-changelog v2026.05.25-1 to npm and GitHub with full-history CHANGELOG.md and zero leaked secrets.
User explicitly requested production readiness check on 2026-05-25.

value.author: claude
